staticmap.descr: Helm Server - Runs syslog-ng and vector

rule.descr: Incoming HTTP to NGINX Reverse Proxies
Incoming HTTPS to NGINX Reverse Proxies
Block ALL internal networks from WORK
NAT Incoming HTTP to NGINX Reverse Proxies
NAT Incoming HTTPS to NGINX Reverse Proxies
Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule
Give WORK access to its own gateway
Block Lab Services to Other Internal Networks
Default Block Personal to other VLANs
Block IoT from accessing other VLANs

alias.name: RFC1918_excluding_LAB_SERVICES
alias.descr: RFC1918 minus LAB_SERVICES — intra-lab traffic allowed, cross-VLAN blocked
Subnets MANAGEMENT cannot initiate connections to: WORK and SANDBOX
alias.name: MANAGEMENT_DENIED

revision.description: ansible pfsense_rule removed 'NGINX to Umami' on 'DMZ'

package.name: suricata
package.descr: High Performance Network IDS, IPS and Security Monitoring engine by OISF.
